CREATE TABLE list_test (id INTEGER, list_1 LIST<INTEGER>, list_2 LIST<INTEGER>);
SELECT list_zip(list_1, list_2, TRUE) FROM list_test;
SELECT id, list_zip(list_1, list_2) AS zipped FROM list_test WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, list_zip(list_1, list_2) AS zipped FROM list_test WHERE list_1 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, list_zip(list_1, list_2) AS zipped FROM list_test WHERE list_2 IS NULL;
SELECT id, list_zip(list_1, list_2) AS zipped FROM list_test WHERE list_1 = [1, 2, 3];
WITH temp_zip AS (SELECT list_zip(list_1, list_2) AS zipped FROM list_test) SELECT * FROM temp_zip WHERE zipped IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, list_zip(list_1, list_2) AS zipped FROM list_test WHERE list_zip(list_1, list_2) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, list_zip(list_1, list_2) AS zipped FROM list_test WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM list_test WHERE list_1 IS NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE other_lists (id INTEGER, list_a LIST<INTEGER>, list_b LIST<INTEGER>);
SELECT id, list_zip(t1.list_1, t2.list_a) FROM list_test t1 JOIN other_lists t2 ON t1.id = t2.id;
SELECT id, list_zip(t1.list_1, t2.list_a, TRUE) FROM list_test t1 JOIN other_lists t2 ON t1.id = t2.id;
